info.title: Hex.pm API
info.description: REST API for the Hex.pm package registry, providing endpoints to search and retrieve package metadata, manage releases, handle authentication, manage API keys, and administer organizations and package ownership. The API supports JSON and Erlang media types.

ApiKeyAuth.name: Authorization
ApiKeyAuth.description: API token authentication. Pass the token directly: `Authorization: token`. For OAuth2 Bearer tokens use: `Authorization: Bearer token`.

BearerAuth.description: OAuth2 Bearer token obtained via Device Authorization Grant (RFC 8628).

BasicAuth.description: Deprecated. Basic authentication with username and password. Only allowed on specific endpoints for generating API tokens.

X-RateLimit-Limit.description: The maximum number of requests permitted per minute.

X-RateLimit-Remaining.description: The remaining number of requests allowed until reset.

X-RateLimit-Reset.description: The time at which the rate limit window resets in UNIX epoch.

page.name: page
page.description: Page number for paginated results. Starts at 1.

username_or_email.name: username_or_email
username_or_email.description: Username or email address of the user.

html_url.description: URL to package page on hex.pm.

checksum.description: SHA-256 checksum of the release tarball.

authing_key.description: Whether the current request is authenticated with this key.

secret.description: The actual secret key (only returned on creation).

name.description: Unique name for the API key.

permissions.description: List of permissions for the key.

resource.description: Resource the permission applies to (use * for all).

public_key.description: Repository's public key for signature verification.

name.description: Name of the client to display.

get.description: Returns available API endpoints and documentation URL.

200.description: API index with URL templates for all resources.

get.description: Returns information about a specific user.
Returns information about the currently authenticated user.
Returns audit logs for the currently authenticated user.

post.description: Sends a password reset email to the user.

get.description: Returns a list of all available Hex repositories.
Returns information about a specific repository.
Returns a list of all organizations the authenticated user is a member of.
Returns information about a specific organization.

post.description: Updates organization settings such as billing email.

get.description: Returns audit logs for a specific organization.
Returns all members of an organization.

post.description: Adds a user to an organization.

get.description: Returns information about a specific organization member.

post.description: Updates the role of an organization member.

delete.description: Removes a user from an organization.

get.description: Returns a paginated list of packages. Supports search and sorting.

parameters.name: sort
parameters.description: Sort order. Options: name, downloads, inserted_at, updated_at, recent_downloads.

parameters.name: search
parameters.description: Search string. Supports field search: name:nerves*, description:framework, extra:type,nerves.

get.description: Returns information about a specific package including all releases and owners.
Returns audit logs for a specific package.
Returns detailed information about a specific release of a package.

delete.description: Removes a release. Only possible within one hour of publishing and if no other packages depend on it.

403.description: Not authorized or time window expired.

post.description: Publishes a new release for a package. The body must be a valid Hex package tarball.
Marks a release as retired with a reason and optional message.

delete.description: Removes the retired status from a release.

get.description: Returns documentation for a specific release.

post.description: Publishes documentation for a release. Body must be a gzipped tarball.

delete.description: Removes documentation for a specific release.

get.description: Returns all owners of a package.
Returns information about a specific owner of a package.

put.description: Adds a user as an owner of a package.

delete.description: Removes a user as an owner of a package.

get.description: Returns all API keys for the authenticated user.

post.description: Creates a new API key. The secret is only returned on creation.

201.description: API key created. The secret field is only returned here.

delete.description: Removes all API keys for the authenticated user. Requires Basic authentication.

get.description: Returns information about a specific API key.
Returns all API keys for an organization.

post.description: Creates a new API key for an organization.
Creates a short URL for a given long URL.

get.description: Verifies that the current authentication credentials are valid.

post.description: Initiates the OAuth2 Device Authorization Grant flow (RFC 8628). Returns a device code and user code for the client to display.
Exchanges a device code for an OAuth2 access token after user has authorized the device.
Revokes an OAuth2 token using its hash value.

token_hash.description: The SHA-256 hash of the token to revoke.
